name: Arrowhead Lake Community Association
description: Arrowhead Lake Community Association is a place to play pickleball in Pocono Lake, PA. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are private.

name: Barley Creek Brewing Company
description: Barley Creek Brewing Company is a place to play pickleball in Tannersville, PA. There is 1 outdoor court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. Players have access to food, restrooms, and lights. The court is free.

name: Forever Fitness
description: Come play pickleball at Forever Fitness in Pocono Summit, PA! There are 2 indoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. The courts can be reserved.
fees: Private — Membership Registration fee $25 Annually, $5/hr. Non-Members $10/hr

name: Mo'R Tennis, Fitness, and Sports
description:
Membership Benefits Include:

    Unlimited pickleball play
    Three month preferred court time reservations
    Member discount on lessons and clinics
    Member discount on personal training
    Member discount on group exercise
    Sauna
    Fitness add-on available
fees: Fee required — TeamReach Code: MorPickle18/ Dropin $12/Weekly $20/Monthly $48

name: Mountain View Park
description: Come play pickleball at Mountain View Park in Pocono Lake, PA! There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. Amenities include restrooms. The court is free.

name: Mountain Vista Campground
description: Mountain Vista Campground is a place to play pickleball in East Stroudsburg, PA. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Signature Training Academy
description: Signature Training Academy is a place to play pickleball in Brodheadsville, PA. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: TLC Park
description: TLC Park is a place to play pickleball in Tannersville, PA. There are 3 outdoor hard and acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. You can reserve the courts.
fees: Members only — Reservation only free only to Townships residents.  Non residents 20.00 Cours must be reserved by 2pm
